measures.title: Emergency Medical Services Property Tax Levy
measures.what_it_does: Continues East County Fire & Rescue's regular emergency medical services property tax levy for six consecutive years beginning in 2027.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes a regular property tax levy of $0.35 or less per $1,000 of assessed value.

taxes.basis: YES continues a property tax levy for emergency medical services.

measures.jurisdiction: Clark County Fire Protection District No. 10
measures.title: New Fire Station General Obligation Bonds
measures.what_it_does: Authorizes the district to construct and equip a new fire station, issue $15.2 million in general obligation bonds maturing within 20 years, and levy annual excess property taxes to repay the bonds.
measures.cost_line: Authorizes $15,200,000 in bonds repaid by annual excess property taxes.

taxes.basis: YES authorizes bond debt and excess property taxes for a new fire station.
